interaction.prompt: Power play, 1-3-1. The PK has collapsed up high to take away your point and cross-ice. Where's the open pass?

feedback.right: Bumper is open — the PK collapsed too high, the slot is yours.
feedback.wrong: Look at the PK again. The point and the cross-ice winger are both covered. The middle of the ice is open.

tip: When the PK overcommits up high on a 1-3-1, the bumper IS the play.
why: 1-3-1 power plays live off three options: bumper, weak-side flank, and point. When the kill cheats one, the others open up.
